title: Day 7 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these three sentences:  

Sentence 1 - こんばん いっしょに ごはん を たべません か。 (konban isshoni gohan o tabemasen ka) = Would you like to have dinner together?

Sentence 2 - いい ですね。 (ii desune) = Sounds good.

Sentence ３ - すみません こんばん は ちょっと。。。 (sumimasen konban wa chotto...) = I'm sorry, I can't tonight.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.  Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
